channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: 24KaratAu/openhub
item.description: Terminal discovery hub and package manager for AI coding tools, MCP servers, and agent skills. Built with Python & Textual — ⭐11, Python

item.title: Nether403/SpriteGameGen
item.description: AI Sprite & Game Asset Tool with its own local MCP server and Agent skills — ⭐11, HTML

item.title: regiellis/godot-mcp-go
item.description: Drive a running Godot 4.7 editor — and the running game — from the terminal or an AI agent. Go CLI + editor addon, 312 commands, MCP server with live-built tool schemas. — ⭐7, GDScript

item.title: nirholas/robinhood-chain-alert-bot
item.description: Real-time alert bot for Robinhood Chain - Telegram, Discord, and X (Twitter). Tracks new launches, graduations, whale trades, Stock Token premium/discount arbitrage, holder milestones, and liquidity-p — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: HsiangNianian/wechat-publisher-mcp
item.description: Authenticated remote MCP server for publishing WeChat Official Account articles from Agents — ⭐5, Python

item.title: r00tify/crashdx
item.description: A deterministic crash diagnosis engine for .ips reports (CLI + MCP server) — ⭐5, Swift

item.title: nirholas/robinhood-toolkit
item.description: Build on Robinhood Chain and Robinhood Crypto: verified network constants, a chain SDK, a read-only MCP server, runnable examples, and 64 build prompts. — ⭐5, Solidity

item.title: awesomemotive/pushengage-mcp
item.description: Official MCP server for PushEngage. Query campaigns, manage segments, and automate push notifications via any MCP compatible AI assistant through natural language. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: nirholas/robinhood-mcp
item.description: Model Context Protocol servers for the official Robinhood Crypto Trading API — the credentialed brokerage API at trading.robinhood.com, documented at docs.robinhood.com/crypto/trading. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: proluct/skanna
item.description: Security scanner for Claude Code skills, plugins, and MCP servers. A verdict before you install. — ⭐4, n/a

item.title: Dudude-bit/yandex-lavka-mcp
item.description: Unofficial MCP server for ordering Yandex Lavka groceries from an AI assistant (search, cart, checkout with confirmation) — ⭐4, Python

item.title: ImShaoJun/structured-knowledge-filesystem
item.description: A local knowledge navigation server that exposes structured documentation to AI agents through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). — ⭐4, Go

item.title: crude-code/mcp-app
item.description: Crude Code — MCP server & spec-driven inline renderer for oil & gas data analytics — ⭐3, Python

item.title: sjamal/dalio-sovereign-strength-index
item.description: A quantitative macroeconomic engine implementing Ray Dalio's Changing World Order frameworks with Python, FastAPI, Streamlit, and MCP interfaces. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: AdamRussak/self-doc
item.description: Self-hosted documentation RAG pipeline that serves semantic search to LLM agents over the Model Context Protocol. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: bagowix/dishka-fastmcp
item.description: Dishka dependency injection for FastMCP tools, resources, and prompts with request scopes and deterministic finalization. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: DrYe1109/MS-MCP
item.description: External MCP server for BIOVIA Materials Studio with guided Windows setup, GUI Dashboard, Forcite, DMol3 and CASTEP workflows. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: hung12ct/culi
item.description: Self-improving context & memory for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex. One canonical knowledge store injected only when relevant — hooks push budgeted context, an MCP server serves depth on demand, and it — ⭐3, Go

item.title: erayendes/app-store-connect-mcp
item.description: Heimdall — MCP server for the Apple App Store Connect API & App Store Server API (StoreKit 2). 982 tools generated from Apple's official OpenAPI spec. Client-agnostic: Claude, Codex, Cursor, and any M — ⭐36, TypeScript

item.title: KaichenCurry/TabNexus
item.description: Turn tab overload into a local-first workspace with intent-first AI organization and Agent collaboration through MCP. — ⭐28, TypeScript

item.title: TengByte/mcpgrade
item.description: Lighthouse for MCP servers — score any MCP server on agent usability, not just spec compliance — ⭐19, TypeScript

item.title: 0xkillaflow/agama-redmine-mcp
item.description: MCP server for Redmine. Enables AI agents to work with issues using simple natural language commands. — ⭐17, TypeScript

item.title: obundh/korea-public-data-catalog-mcp
item.description: 대한민국 공공데이터를 조합해 서비스 아이디어를 설계하는 정적 메타데이터 MCP 공개 베타 — ⭐13, TypeScript

item.title: hongnoul/hwatu
item.description: Visual verification browser for AI coding agents: daemon-based WebKitGTK, real rendering, ~13ms window spawn — ⭐13, Rust

item.title: anshupriyan/cli-bridge
item.description: MCP server for Claude Desktop and other Model Context Protocol clients — sandboxed filesystem access (read/write/edit/search) plus Dev Mode-gated shell command execution, scoped to a single workspace — ⭐12, TypeScript

item.title: HossamYoussof/opencode-config
item.description: Personal OpenCode configuration with MCP servers, agent presets, and cross-platform installer — ⭐8, Shell

item.title: pioner92/symbolpeek-mcp
item.description: Ask for the symbol, not the file. Token-efficient MCP server giving AI coding agents symbol-level reads of TS/JS, Rust, Python, Java, Go, JSON, and Markdown — ⭐8, Rust

item.title: do-md/homekb
item.description: Local-first personal Markdown knowledge base with semantic search, AI Q&A, MCP, desktop/web clients, and a self-hostable zero-data-at-rest relay. — ⭐6, TypeScript
